consistency_checks: Verified the cart text reads 'Your cart is empty.'
Observed an order card appears with an order ID and 'Total charged: $12.50' after clicking Checkout
Confirmed no items or quantities are listed in the cart when the order is created

bug_report.expected_behavior: Checkout should be disabled or should display an error when the cart is empty, and no order should be created or charged.
bug_report.observed_behavior: With the cart showing 'Your cart is empty.', clicking the Checkout button creates an order (e.g., 'Order ord_db6cc37d') and displays 'Total charged: $12.50'.
reproduction_steps: Open the Demo Shop home page.
Ensure the Cart panel shows 'Your cart is empty.'
Observe that an order card appears with an order ID and a non-zero 'Total charged' despite no items in the cart.
bug_report.title: Checkout succeeds and charges even when cart is empty

consistency_checks: Verified the cart text reads 'Your cart is empty.'
Observed an order card appears with an order ID and 'Total charged: $12.50' after clicking Checkout
Confirmed no items or quantities are listed in the cart when the order is created
decision.observation_summary: Cart panel says 'Your cart is empty.' but clicking Checkout still creates an order card showing 'Order ord_db6cc37d – Total charged: $12.50'.
decision.reason: Checkout should not succeed with an empty cart; the UI shows an order was created and charged despite no items.
decision.reasoning: The right-side cart explicitly states it is empty while an order summary appears beneath it with a charge amount. Multiple quick clicks on Checkout when the cart displayed empty repeatedly produced orders earlier as well. This indicates the system allows checkout with no items, leading to a charged order that doesn't match the visible cart state.
